items.title: The Suns lock in the last of their own priority free agents, finishing negotiations with Williams' Excel Sports Management agents Jeff Schwartz and Jordan Gertler on Thursday night. First young guards Collin Gillespie and Jordan Goodwin over the weekend, now Williams.
items.author: Shams Charania Tweets
items.body_excerpt: The Suns lock in the last of their own priority free agents, finishing negotiations with Williams' Excel Sports Management agents Jeff Schwartz and Jordan Gertler on Thursday night. First young guards Collin Gillespie and Jordan Goodwin over the weekend, now Williams.

items.author: NBA.com

items.title: With estimates plugged in for Collin Gillespie and Jordan Goodwin, I've got the Suns projected at $1.2 million over the luxury tax with two open standard roster spots. Phoenix projects to be roughly $6.7M under the first apron.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
With estimates plugged in for Collin Gillespie and Jordan Goodwin, I've got the Suns projected at $1.2 million over the luxury tax with two open standard roster spots. Phoenix projects to be roughly $6.7M under the first apron.

Mark Williams is the team's main unsigned FA.
